CONTENT.Club career: Raimund joined the youth academy of Stuttgart in 2019. On 10 August 2022, he signed his first professional contract with Stuttgart. He made his senior debut with Stuttgart as a substitute in a 2–0 Bundesliga loss to Heidenheim on 5 November 2023.
CONTENT.Personal life: The German ski jumper Philipp Raimund is Luca's cousin.
CONTENT.External links: Luca Raimund at SoccerwayLuca Raimund at DFB (also available in German)
CONTENT.International career: Raimund is a youth international for Germany, having played up to the Germany U18s.

SUMMARY: Luca Joachim Raimund (born 9 April 2005) is a German professional footballer who plays as a winger for VfB Stuttgart II in the 3. Liga.
